description: LeadPost identifies anonymous website visitors and delivers names, emails, and addresses for up to 40% of traffic, supporting B2B and B2C lead generation.
tagline: Turn More Website Visitors Into B2C and B2B Leads
overview: LeadPost helps businesses and agencies convert anonymous website traffic into actionable leads by revealing the names, email addresses, and mailing addresses of visitors who never fill out a form. A single line of code connects the site to a third-party opt-in network, with results typically appearing immediately after implementation.
what_is: LeadPost is a website visitor identification tool built for businesses and agencies that want to capture leads from traffic that would otherwise leave without any trace. Instead of returning IP ranges or company guesses, it delivers real contact details, including names, email addresses, and physical addresses, for up to 40% of site visitors. This significantly increases the pool of reachable prospects without requiring any changes to the existing site beyond one line of code.

LeadPost is well suited to B2B lead routing, B2C targeting, and agency setups managing multiple clients. Because the implementation is minimal, qualified leads start appearing quickly after the snippet goes live, giving marketers a fast path to actionable data. Teams that want to act on visitor behavior without waiting weeks for form-fill accumulation find it particularly practical.

The tool fits into broader marketing stacks by supporting data enrichment, CRM lead routing, and built-in retargeting across email, social, display, and direct mail channels. It is not a full marketing automation platform and does not rely on third-party cookies. Its scope is deliberately narrow: identify visitors, enrich the resulting contact data, and feed that data into downstream channels while remaining compliant with applicable privacy regulations.
